calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and reviewing of the declaration filed, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Barbara Stewart as follows:
Principal $54,247.94
Prejudgment Interest $4,041.65
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $385.00, for a total of $61,174.59
Judgment signed in open court.
